name: combine-shimmerite-clay
check: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return false; var ids = [object.id, indirect.id].sort(); return ids[0] === 'item:sealed-clay' && ids[1] === 'item:shimmerite-dust';
perform: if (object.location !== player.id || indirect.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You need to be holding both ingredients.'); var events = [lib.moveEvent('item:shimmerite-dust', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Shimmerite dust consumed' }), lib.moveEvent('item:sealed-clay', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Sealed clay consumed' }), lib.createEvent('item:shimmer-brick', { tags: ['portable', 'material'], properties: { location: player.id, name: 'Shimmer Brick', description: 'A dense, glittering brick that pulses faintly with trapped light. The shimmerite fused with the clay under pressure, creating something that feels warm and slightly alive in your hands.', aliases: ['brick'], material: 'shimmerite-clay', craftable: true }, description: 'Created shimmer brick' }), lib.award('craft', 1)]; return { output: 'You work the shimmerite dust into the sealed clay. The clay absorbs the powder, glows briefly, and hardens into a dense, glittering brick.', events: events };

name: combine-wire-glass
check: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return false; var ids = [object.id, indirect.id].sort(); return ids[0] === 'item:coppervine-wire' && ids[1] === 'item:void-glass-shard';
perform: if (object.location !== player.id || indirect.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You need to be holding both ingredients.'); var events = [lib.moveEvent('item:coppervine-wire', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Coppervine wire consumed' }), lib.moveEvent('item:void-glass-shard', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Void glass shard consumed' }), lib.createEvent('item:resonance-lens', { tags: ['portable', 'material'], properties: { location: player.id, name: 'Resonance Lens', description: 'A dark glass lens cradled in a frame of living wire. The coppervine has wrapped itself around the shard in tight spirals, and the glass hums at a frequency you feel in your teeth more than hear.', aliases: ['lens'], material: 'coppervine-glass', craftable: true }, description: 'Created resonance lens' }), lib.award('craft', 1)]; return { output: 'You wrap the coppervine wire around the void glass shard. The wire tightens on its own, spiraling into a frame. The glass hums — a resonance lens.', events: events };

name: combine-brick-lens
check: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return false; var ids = [object.id, indirect.id].sort(); return ids[0] === 'item:resonance-lens' && ids[1] === 'item:shimmer-brick';
perform: if (object.location !== player.id || indirect.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You need to be holding both ingredients.'); var events = [lib.moveEvent('item:shimmer-brick', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Shimmer brick consumed' }), lib.moveEvent('item:resonance-lens', { to: 'void', from: player.id, description: 'Resonance lens consumed' }), lib.createEvent('item:detector', { tags: ['portable', 'tool'], properties: { location: player.id, name: 'Detector', description: 'A palm-sized device: a resonance lens set into a shimmer brick housing. It vibrates gently in your hand, and the lens darkens when you point it at anything interesting — the more unusual the material, the darker the glass.', aliases: ['device', 'scanner'] }, description: 'Created detector' }), lib.award('craft', 2)]; return { output: 'You press the resonance lens into the shimmer brick. The brick softens just enough to accept it, then hardens around the frame. The lens flares once, then settles into a gentle pulse. You have made a detector.', events: events };

name: combine-fallback
perform: if (command.form !== 'ditransitive') return lib.result('Combine what with what?'); if (object.location !== player.id || indirect.location !== player.id) return lib.result('You need to be holding both items.'); return lib.result('You try combining ' + lib.ref(object) + ' with ' + lib.ref(indirect) + ', but nothing useful happens.');
